subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Your letter was received and verily it brought joy and was conducive to spiritual fragrance. Thus should letters be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی نامه شما رسید فی الحقیقه مفرح بود و مورث روح و ریحان نامه باید چنین
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God
